title: Pan-Seared Algerian Confit Chicken with Tomato
description: A flavorful North African-inspired dish featuring tender confit chicken, pan-seared to perfection and served with a fresh tomato sauce.
instructions: 1. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add the confit chicken and sear until golden brown on both sides, about 5-7 minutes.
3. Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
4. Reduce heat to medium and add the chopped tomato.
5. Cook, stirring occasionally, until the tomato is tender and lightly caramelized, about 10 minutes.
6. Stir in the chopped pcharred and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
7. Add the cooked chicken back into the skillet and toss to coat with the tomato sauce.
8. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
9. Serve immediately, garnished with additional pcharred if desired.
